required_tools.reason: All tasks require GitHub repository access for code management, PR creation, and source control operations across the Anchor program, sidecar, controller, CLI demo, and web dashboard.

Task 4 integrates billing into the CTO Kubernetes controller (CodeRun CRD reconciliation), Task 5's sidecar deploys as a K8s pod, and the infrastructure context shows CRDs (coderuns.agents.platform, boltruns.cto.5dlabs.ai) and services (cto/cto-controller) that must be referenced.

Tasks 1-3 require Anchor/Solana framework documentation for correct PDA derivation, SPL token CPIs, and Anchor v0.30+ features (Optional accounts, init_if_needed). Tasks 6-8 require @solana/web3.js, @solana/wallet-adapter, and @coral-xyz/anchor client-side documentation. Task 7 needs shadcn/ui component API references.
Tasks 7 and 8 build the Next.js web dashboard using shadcn/ui components (DataTable, Card, Badge, Dialog, Input, Tabs, Toast, etc.) and require component installation and configuration.

Multiple tasks consume artifacts from other tasks (Task 1 IDL → Tasks 3,5,6,7,8; Task 4 controller crate structure). Agents need to understand existing codebase structure for the controller integration (Task 4) and to verify cross-crate consistency.

All implementation subtasks require file creation and editing across Rust (programs/cto-billing/, crates/controller/, crates/settlement-sidecar/), TypeScript (tests/, demo/cli/, demo/web/), TOML (Cargo.toml, Anchor.toml), and JSON (package.json, tsconfig.json) files.

recommended_tools.reason: Useful for Task 4 (controller integration) to search existing controller codebase for reconciliation loop patterns, S3 client usage, and CodeRun CRD type definitions. Also helpful for understanding the existing module structure before modifying crates/controller/.

The project has multiple decision points (optional accounts strategy, Redis client choice, S3 client approach, data refresh strategy) and cross-task dependencies. OpenMemory can store resolved decisions and architectural context for consistency across the 8 tasks.
Task 5's settlement sidecar will need a K8s deployment managed via ArgoCD alongside the existing CTO controller. Useful for verifying deployment configuration after Docker image is built.
Task 5 mentions Prometheus metrics and observability. Grafana dashboards could visualize sidecar health (events_processed, events_failed, solana_rpc_errors) post-deployment.
